title: Algerian Mellow Tortilla Wrap
description: A flavorful vegetarian wrap filled with mellow earthy goodness, inspired by Algerian spices.
instructions: 1. Preheat a dry skillet or griddle over medium heat.
2. Brush the Algerian tortilla with olive oil and cook for 1-2 minutes, until lightly browned.
3. Flip the tortilla and cook for another minute.
4. Spread the mellow earthy filling down the center of the tortilla.
5. Sprinkle the quesadilla cheese on top of the filling, if using.
6. Fold the bottom half of the tortilla up over the filling, then fold in the sides and roll the wrap into a neat cylinder.
7. Cook the wrap for another 2-3 minutes, until the tortilla is crispy and the filling is heated through.
8. Garnish with chopped fresh parsley and serve immediately.
